title: senecio pachyrhizus
intro: Senecio pachyrhizus, also known as the 'Rabbit's Bread' or 'Korean Groundsel', is a plant species in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Senecio. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its unique compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio pachyrhizus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
